description_long: This object is a medium-sized potted plant featuring long, slender, arching green leaves that radiate outward from a central base. The leaves are semi-translucent and have a slightly wavy texture, giving the plant a lush and natural appearance. The pot is round, with a smooth, matte brown finish and a slightly flared rim, suggesting it is made of terracotta or a similar material. There are no visible decorative patterns or embellishments on the pot, keeping the design simple and utilitarian. The plant appears healthy and well-maintained, with leaves that are evenly distributed and no visible signs of damage. This type of potted plant is commonly used to add greenery to urban environments such as offices, homes, or public spaces.
description: A medium-sized potted plant with long, arching green leaves in a plain brown terracotta pot. The plant has a lush, natural look and the pot is simple and unadorned.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full spread of the arching green leaves and the round, plain brown pot.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view highlighting the layered arrangement of the leaves and the pot's smooth surface.
description_view_2: Another angled view emphasizing the plant's dense foliage and the pot's unadorned rim.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the even distribution of leaves and the consistent, plain finish of the pot.
